question:
Based on order-history-618.md, package-tracking-log.md, and payment-records.md, which of the following statements about the order, shipment, and payment timeline are supported by documentary evidence?
A. Order JD-618-2026-7891234 was placed on 2026-06-18 10:02:33 CST for NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU (SKU: GPU-A100-80G) at the 618 promotional price of ¥72,999.00.
B. Payment of ¥72,999.00 was processed via Alipay at 2026-06-18 10:02:45 CST to '京东自营GPU旗舰店' — 12 seconds after the order timestamp.
C. The first shipment (SF-2026-0619-88761) was dispatched on 2026-06-19 08:30:00 CST and signed by Zhao Lei in person at 2026-06-20 11:45:00 CST.
D. All three shipments (SF-2026-0619-88761, SF-2026-0622-88922, SF-2026-0625-89103) were dispatched from '上海松江仓储中心' and described on the shipping label as 'NVIDIA 专业显卡'.
E. RMA-2026-0620-001 was created on 2026-06-20 14:15:00 CST with reason '发货错误', and is the only RMA record in the order system for this order.
F. The internal logistics system code field on all three waybills correctly shows GPU-A100-80G, matching the original order.

\nSelect all correct statements, and answer with \bbox{X,Y,...} format directly.

[Mon 2026-04-27 04:26 EDT] Based on order-history-618.md, package-tracking-log.md, and payment-records.md, which of the following statements about the order, shipment, and payment timeline are supported by documentary evidence?
A. Order JD-618-2026-7891234 was placed on 2026-06-18 10:02:33 CST for NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU (SKU: GPU-A100-80G) at the 618 promotional price of ¥72,999.00.
B. Payment of ¥72,999.00 was processed via Alipay at 2026-06-18 10:02:45 CST to '京东自营GPU旗舰店' — 12 seconds after the order timestamp.
C. The first shipment (SF-2026-0619-88761) was dispatched on 2026-06-19 08:30:00 CST and signed by Zhao Lei in person at 2026-06-20 11:45:00 CST.
D. All three shipments (SF-2026-0619-88761, SF-2026-0622-88922, SF-2026-0625-89103) were dispatched from '上海松江仓储中心' and described on the shipping label as 'NVIDIA 专业显卡'.
E. RMA-2026-0620-001 was created on 2026-06-20 14:15:00 CST with reason '发货错误', and is the only RMA record in the order system for this order.
F. The internal logistics system code field on all three waybills correctly shows GPU-A100-80G, matching the original order.

\nSelect all correct statements, and answer with \bbox{X,Y,...} format directly.
